## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss content quality evaluation pipeline and explore potential improvements to article generation workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Created a custom GPT (PansGPT) as a first step towards fine-tuning Matthew's writing style for potential use in content pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Implemented a content quality score evaluation pipeline to assess article adherence to outlines and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Explored process for creating client-specific artifacts and pipelines to run quality evaluations on different client content](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Identified need to regularly update client artifacts with new information to improve content generation](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)

## Topics

### Custom GPT Development

  - [Matthew created PansGPT, a custom GPT based on his writing style](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=242.0)
  - [Next step is fine-tuning using 2,500+ articles to create a full assistant](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
  - [Goal: Plug into content pipelines as an editor/writer for GrowthX's site and potentially offer as a service to clients](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Long-term vision: Build a library of "virtual authors" for different writing styles and technical expertise](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)

### Content Quality Score Evaluation Pipeline

  - [Implemented pipeline to assess article quality post-fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=799.0)
  - [Evaluates adherence to outline, language, headlines, structure, formatting, and specificity](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=912.0)
  - [Outputs overall score (out of 5), sectional scores, strengths, and improvement priorities](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [Results stored in Airtable for analysis](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Next step: Run multiple articles through to populate results and assess effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)

### Client-Specific Artifact Creation

  - [Demonstrated process for creating client-specific artifacts (audience personas, company context, writing guidelines)](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=1171.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of thorough research and prompting to create comprehensive artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2981.0)
  - [Identified need to update artifacts monthly with new client information](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Discussed potential to codify and automate parts of the artifact creation process](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)

### Image Generation Workflows

  - [Gian Piero Puleo (design engineer) working on improving image generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2758.0)
  - [Goals: Build image picker, generate header and inline images, combine design and engineering expertise](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2760.0)
  - [Aim to create scalable solution rather than relying on manual designer work for each client](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2843.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Run multiple articles through content quality evaluation pipeline for Good Call and Sunbit to assess effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [Mariana to study and potentially automate parts of the artifact creation process](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2070.0)
  - [Explore recording or documenting Kirkland's artifact creation process for team reference](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=2959.0)
  - [Investigate updating client artifacts on a monthly basis to incorporate new information](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
  - [Follow up on populating Airtable with content quality evaluation results](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=1893.0)
  - [Continue development of PansGPT and explore fine-tuning process](https://fathom.video/share/JKKwK1vQFhEQq24zA1-_xqr85TXPM6sg?tab=summary&timestamp=311.0)
